name: Crunchy Chocolate Chipsters
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 9 Minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease a baking sheet with Butter Flavor Crisco and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and milk using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
3. Beat in the Egg and Vanilla into the mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the Flour, Baking soda, and Salt. Gradually add this dry mixture to the creamed mixture, stirring until fully incorporated.
5. Stir in the Crisp rice cereal and Chocolate chips. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 350°F for 9 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
